title: Borealis Dataverse Dataset
description: JSON Schema for a Dataset object returned by the Borealis (Canadian Dataverse) native REST API, as used by the Universite de Montreal collection. Derived from the Dataverse v6.8.1 OpenAPI Dataset schema; only fields actually present in the spec are retained.

id.description: Internal numeric database identifier for the dataset.

storageIdentifier.description: Backing storage identifier for the dataset.

identifier.description: Persistent identifier value within the authority.

identifierRegistered.description: Whether the persistent identifier is registered with the provider.

globalIdCreateTime.description: Timestamp when the global persistent identifier was created.

createDate.description: Date the dataset record was created.

dtype.description: Internal discriminator type for the persisted DvObject.
